title: Big Globe Compat - Cobblemon
description: This datapack adds compatibility between Cobblemon and Big Globe.
body:
This datapack allows Pokemon to spawn in Big Globe, adds all plants, and adds all fossils/ruins to the terrain generation for Big Globe.

In order to have the Pokemon spawn in their proper rarity brackets, adding Big Globe's tags to cobblemon's biome tags was the way to go. Big Globe doesn't really rely on biomes for generating it's world, so there are certain biomes that don't really match or exist, like there being no mountain/highlands or warm/cold ocean biomes. So some Pokemon may spawn in a bit out of place areas, but that's all I can do.

Evolution stone ores spawn 128 below the surface and become more common the deeper you go, functioning like Big Globe's gold ore but with relevant restrictions to each ore. They spawn in a radius of 1-2 blocks, so they're fairly small and a little uncommon.

Below is how each ore spawns;\
Fire Stone Ore spawns more frequently in hot temperature and the Nether\
Thunder Stone Ore spawns more frequently in hilly areas\
Water Stone Ore spawns under oceans and rivers\
Leaf Stone Ore spawns more frequently around high foliage\
Moon Stone Ore spawns more frequently in cold temperature\
Sun Stone Ore spawns more frequently in hot temperature\
Dawn Stone Ore spawns more frequently in hilly areas\
Dusk Stone Ore spawns more frequently in magical areas\
Shiny Stone Ore spawns more frequently in magical areas\
Ice Stone Ore spawns more frequently in cold temperature
